created_at.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = Table1.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["created_at"])) : created_at })()}}

rating_ambience.cellBackground:
{{(() => { const tableData = Table1.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (
  currentRow.rating_ambience == 1 ? "#FEE2E2" :
  currentRow.rating_ambience == 2 ? "#FFEDD5" :
  currentRow.rating_ambience == 3 ? "#FEF9C3" :
  currentRow.rating_ambience == 4 ? "#DCFCE7" :
  currentRow.rating_ambience == 5 ? "#BBF7D0" :
  "transparent"
)) : 
  currentRow.rating_ambience == 1 ? "#FEE2E2" :
  currentRow.rating_ambience == 2 ? "#FFEDD5" :
  currentRow.rating_ambience == 3 ? "#FEF9C3" :
  currentRow.rating_ambience == 4 ? "#DCFCE7" :
  currentRow.rating_ambience == 5 ? "#BBF7D0" :
  "transparent"
 })()}}
rating_ambience.computedValue: {{(() => { const tableData = Table1.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow["rating_ambience"])) : rating_ambience })()}}
rating_ambience.label: Ambience
